ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每年笔记设置！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No periodic notes settings are enabled. You must turn on either the daily or weekly notes within the Periodic Notes plugin settings to be able to configure automatic tasks.
ast.target: 未启用任何周期性笔记设置。您必须在“周期性笔记”插件设置中启用每日或每周笔记，才能配置自动任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download and enable the Tasks plugin to enable due date functionality within your tasks and TODOs.
ast.target: 下载并启用“任务”插件，以在您的任务和待办事项中启用截止日期功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix to add to any carried over tasks, e.g. "[>]".
ast.target: 添加到任何延续任务的前缀，例如“[>]”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the header to be added to the top of the tasks section within new notes - include any markdown to set the heading style.
ast.target: 设置要添加到新笔记中任务部分顶部的标题 - 包括任何用于设置标题样式的Markdown。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of headings within the notes to search and include any carry over tasks from. Leave this blank to search the entire note.
ast.target: 在笔记中搜索并包含任何延续任务的标题列表（用逗号分隔）。留空则搜索整个笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Any newly discovered tasks will be added into the Kanban board you choose.
ast.target: 任何新发现的任务都将添加到您选择的看板中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the Kanban board that will have tasks automatically added.
ast.target: 这是将自动添加任务的看板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select folders to ignore reading tasks from when syncing to the Kanban board.
ast.target: 选择在同步到看板时要忽略阅读任务的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter task names to ignore when syncing to the Kanban board. You can enter regular expression patterns, e.g. "^Meeting:"
ast.target: 输入在同步到看板时要忽略的任务名称。您可以输入正则表达式模式，例如“^Meeting:”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download and enable the Kanban plugin to automatically sync tasks into your chosen Kanban board.
ast.target: 下载并启用“看板”插件，以自动将任务同步到您选择的看板中。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatically synchronise tasks to Kanban board
ast.target: 自动将任务同步到看板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Periodic Notes plugin must be installed and available for Auto Tasks to work.
ast.target: 必须安装并可用“周期性笔记”插件，“自动任务”才能工作。
